name: Western Fight
description: In this western themed game you can fight to the fullest with 8 different characters. With 2 player game mode you can fight with your friends, with 1 player game mode you can have fun with the AI in the game even if you are alone. The aim of the game is to win 2 rounds before your opponent. Fighting with the AI in the game is not as easy as you think, start playing and test yourself
instructions: ---PLAYER 1--- Move WASD Punch V Kick B ---PLAYER 2--- Move Aroow Keys Punch O Kick P
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, 3D, 3D Games, Action, Fight, Fighting, free games for your website, free html5 games for your website, Street Fighting, WebGL
